name: *subway surfers death sfx*
description:
[1/6]

getting stuck in guest 666's ass after a skating incident...

or, sixer glazes her win by smothering you and veeronica's legs with her ass...

trying out the new multiple messages thing, but it won't be in every bot

gonna use pronoun macro things too (sorry they/thems it wont be worded properly)

art by WackyFolly

not too proud of this one, didnt like testing it but i wanted to push it out cuz it was supposed to have been out

lmk if something needs to be changed

all bots from now on will have an option to make your own scenario (scenario 1 is in glasshouses btw)

cant think of many more characters (aside from the six im going to upload) to make bots of, so lmk who yall wanna see
creator: Naitokyatto
